summary: Decent recording of a solid 1994 MSG run with strong setlist highlights like Shakedown Street and New Speedway Boogie, though the performance feels a bit off.
review: The reviewer finds the show’s setlist great but notes that the overall performance is slightly off compared to other MSG dates. Highlights include an energetic Shakedown Street opener, Candyman, New Speedway Boogie, and an atmospheric Drums‑>Space jam. No specific comments on the recording source or sound quality are provided.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one moderate (3‑star) review; positive remarks about setlist but criticism of performance, with no recording details to boost rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not comment on the audio source or fidelity; no mention of soundboard, audience, or technical issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Great setlist with notable highlights, but overall the performance is described as a bit off and not among the standout MSG shows.
